prevalence.population: Women of reproductive age in the EU

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Amsel criteria or Nugent score; pH >4.5; exclude trichomoniasis and candidiasis

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: no routine screening (pregnancy screening policies vary)

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: High access to microscopy/Gram stain in many settings
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Metronidazole or clindamycin regimens; counseling to reduce recurrence; pregnancy management per national guidance
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: High recurrence rates and variability in pregnancy screening practices
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong diagnostic infrastructure and effective standard treatments
